creator: dpostolov@yandex.ru
text:
Sorry for my bad English...
 
FreeBSD 12.3-PRERELEASE FreeBSD 12.3-PRERELEASE r370752 GENERIC  amd64
 
I have an Acer Aspire XC-895 (Intel Core i5-10400/UHD Graphics 630) computer. In FreeBSD 12.3-PRERELEASE-amd64, the drm-fbsd12.0-kmod video driver does not works (although it works for Intel NUC5PPYH, Intel NUC7PJYH for FBSD 12.3 and drm-fbsd13-kmod video driver works for FBSD13 and Acer), so for Acer in 12.3 you have to use the scfb driver. And if I install FBSD 12.3-PRERELEASE-amd64 and Xfce 4.16 (plus xfce4-goodies with xfce4-screensaver) with 'pkg install' and configure it then Xfce desktop halted when xfce4-screensaver starts (with disabled Lock) and scfb driver.
 
The workaround: disable xfce4-screensaver and use xscreensaver then all OK in scfb mode for Acer.
 
Also I test xfce4-screensaver with Intel NUC5PPYH and Intel NUC7PJYH and FBSD 12.3-PRERELEASE-amd64 and _drm-fbsd12.0-kmod_ then all OK with Xfce4 and xfce4-screensaver.
 
Problem in combination with scfb video driver and when xfce4-screensaver starts after pause then Xfce halted.
 
Is it possible to fix this problem for future FreeBSD 12.3-PRERELEASE or BETA?
